sessions.title: The Stillness Within the Storm
sessions.description: A guided exploration of inner peace when the world feels overwhelming.

sessions.title: Open Community Gathering
sessions.description: Monthly open gathering for all members — bring your presence.

sessions.title: Returning to the Present Moment
sessions.description: Embodying presence rather than merely practising it.
sessions.summary: We explored what it means to not just practice presence but to embody it — releasing the habit of living in anticipation and learning to trust the now.

sessions.title: The Language of the Inner Kingdom
sessions.description: How self-talk shapes the inner world.
sessions.summary: This session uncovered how our self-talk shapes our inner world. We learned to identify critical inner voices and replace them with sovereign, compassionate ones.

sessions.title: Stillness as a Practice, Not a State
sessions.description: Relating to stillness as a companion, not an achievement.
sessions.summary: We moved beyond the idea of stillness as something achieved and began relating to it as a companion — always available, always patient.
